title: Svelte-class Imperial shuttle

The '''''Svelte''-class Imperial shuttle''' was a multi-purpose [[Transport/Legends|transport]] utilized by the [[Imperial Remnant]] that was designed as a more aggressive replacement for the aging [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Silviut Corporation]] leveraged its experience as a subcontractor to craft a superior vessel, capable of both long-range transport and space combat support. While inferior to a true [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], the ''Svelte''-class shuttle was capably maneuverable and well-armed for a shuttle.<ref name="SOTG">''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]''</ref>

Often dubbed the "[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|''Vader'']]-class" shuttle by Imperial pilots, the shuttle's black finish indeed gave it the appearance reminiscent of a space-borne beetle or the famous [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]].<ref name="SOTG" />
